name: gemma-forge
description: Local Gemma work harness for project planning, execution, and verification.

scripts.check: python3 -m py_compile chat/server.py chat/workspace_scan.py chat/tool_runtime.py src/app.py src/config.py src/hf_engine.py src/utils.py tests/model_route_test.py tests/integration_test.py tests/skill_routing_test.py tests/maintenance_access_test.py && node --check chat/static/js/chat.js && bash -n tools/harness_service.sh tools/backup_live_state.sh
